description_long: This is a metallic beverage can with a smooth cylindrical body and a slightly indented top and bottom. The can features a gradient color scheme transitioning from deep purple at the top to a warm golden brown at the base. Decorative graphics of large, stylized cherry blossom flowers in light purple are scattered around the can, with some Japanese text prominently displayed on one side. A red and white barcode label with the words 'Made in Substance' is visible on the back. The top of the can is silver, typical of aluminum cans, and appears to be sealed, indicating it is unopened.
description: A metallic can with a purple-to-gold gradient, cherry blossom graphics, Japanese text, and a silver top.
description_view_0: The back of the can shows a red and white barcode label with 'Made in Substance' and a partial flower graphic.
description_view_1: This side displays large Japanese text in white and a partial cherry blossom flower.
description_view_2: Multiple cherry blossom flowers are visible, with no text or labels, emphasizing the floral design.
description_view_3: The front features the largest cherry blossom graphic, with faint gold text near the base.
